###################################################################
### Mod-added ship fleet_entity bindings (GitHub issue #120).
###
### AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generators/gen_fleet_entities.py.
### Do not edit manually — re-run the generator after changing
### the SHIPS table or after a vanilla 1.X bump.
###
### Each block below is a verbatim copy of the named vanilla
### fleet_entity from gfx/map/fleet_entities/01_fleet_entities.txt,
### with only the top-level key and inner `ship_type =` line
### changed to the mod ship_type ID. Every entity, vfx_entity,
### attach, damage_decal_positions, and locator field is
### unchanged so the new ship_types render using vanilla 3D
### assets they reference.
###
### Authoring original 3D ship art is out of scope (Paradox's
### .mesh format is proprietary with no public exporter).
###################################################################


# ===== Destroyer-class escorts (clones of ship_type_destroyer) =====


ship_type_asw_destroyer = {
    ship_type = ship_type_asw_destroyer
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 6.0

	entity = "destroyer_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.01 1.2 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.02 0.8 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.03 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_destroyer_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_destroyer_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_destroyer_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
}

ship_type_guided_missile_ship = {
    ship_type = ship_type_guided_missile_ship
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 6.0

	entity = "destroyer_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.01 1.2 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.02 0.8 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.03 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_destroyer_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_destroyer_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_destroyer_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
}

ship_type_pulsed_laser_escort = {
    ship_type = ship_type_pulsed_laser_escort
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 6.0

	entity = "destroyer_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.01 1.2 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.02 0.8 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.03 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_destroyer_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_destroyer_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_destroyer_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_destroyer_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"				fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_tiny_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_small_03_entity" }
	}
}

# ===== Submarines (clones of ship_type_submarine) =====


ship_type_nuclear_submarine = {
    ship_type = ship_type_nuclear_submarine
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 4.0
	entity = "submarine_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.04 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 1.2 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_submarine_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_submarine_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_submarine_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_heavy_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_stealth_attack_submarine = {
    ship_type = ship_type_stealth_attack_submarine
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 4.0
	entity = "submarine_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.04 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 1.2 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_submarine_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_submarine_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_submarine_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_heavy_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_autonomous_swarm_submarine = {
    ship_type = ship_type_autonomous_swarm_submarine
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 4.0
	entity = "submarine_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.04 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.5 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 1.2 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_submarine_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_submarine_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_submarine_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_submarine_heavy_entity" }
	}

}

# ===== Aircraft carriers (clones of ship_type_aircraft_carrier) =====


ship_type_nuclear_supercarrier = {
    ship_type = ship_type_nuclear_supercarrier
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 9.0

	entity = "aircraftcarrier_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.07 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.05 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_aircraftcarrier_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_aircraftcarrier_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_aircraftcarrier_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Planes
	attach = {
		locator = plane_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   							disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 							fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 							fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"	 				fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 				fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 				fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_fore
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_02_entity" }
	}
}

ship_type_fleet_carrier = {
    ship_type = ship_type_fleet_carrier
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 9.0

	entity = "aircraftcarrier_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.07 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.05 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_aircraftcarrier_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_aircraftcarrier_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_aircraftcarrier_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_aircraftcarrier_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Planes
	attach = {
		locator = plane_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = plane_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "generic_aerial_bleriotxi_02_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_single_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"								fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"							fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   							disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 							fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 							fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_tower_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"	 				fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 				fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 					fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity" 				fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_wing_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_fore
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_trunked_02_entity" }
	}
}

# ===== Capital ships (super-dreadnought template) (clones of ship_type_super_dreadnought) =====


ship_type_arsenal_ship = {
    ship_type = ship_type_arsenal_ship
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 9.0

	entity = "superdreadnought_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.03 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.035 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.035 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_superdreadnought_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_superdreadnought_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_superdreadnought_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Propulsion uses the entity based on Range modification, so it needs to be defined first
	modification = {
		name = funnel
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_range
		entity = "funnel_large_01_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_02_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_03_entity"
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_medium_entity" }
			modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}


	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
}

ship_type_antimatter_battleship = {
    ship_type = ship_type_antimatter_battleship
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 9.0

	entity = "superdreadnought_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.03 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.035 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.035 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_superdreadnought_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_superdreadnought_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_superdreadnought_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Propulsion uses the entity based on Range modification, so it needs to be defined first
	modification = {
		name = funnel
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_range
		entity = "funnel_large_01_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_02_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_03_entity"
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_medium_entity" }
			modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}


	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
}

ship_type_hypersonic_missile_platform = {
    ship_type = ship_type_hypersonic_missile_platform
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 9.0

	entity = "superdreadnought_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.03 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.035 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.035 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_superdreadnought_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_superdreadnought_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_superdreadnought_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Propulsion uses the entity based on Range modification, so it needs to be defined first
	modification = {
		name = funnel
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_range
		entity = "funnel_large_01_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_02_entity"
		entity = "funnel_large_03_entity"
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_medium_entity" }
			modification = { entity = "hull_superdreadnought_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = turret_aft_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}


	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_large_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
}

# ===== Battlecruisers (dreadnought template) (clones of ship_type_dreadnought) =====


ship_type_stealth_battlecruiser = {
    ship_type = ship_type_stealth_battlecruiser
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 8.0

	entity = "dreadnought_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.04 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.04 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.045 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.035 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_dreadnought_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_dreadnought_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_dreadnought_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_dreadnought_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_dreadnought_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_dreadnought_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_bigturret_fore_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_single_02_entity"						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"						fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_bigturret_fore_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_single_02_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity" 						fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_bigturret_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_single_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_bigturret_aft_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_bigturret_aft_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_single_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_twin_02_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_bigturret_tripple_01_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_r_09
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity" fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_08
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_casemate_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_case_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity" }
	}
