# ===== Light cruisers / coordination vessels (clones of ship_type_light_cruiser) =====


ship_type_networked_air_defense_cruiser = {
    ship_type = ship_type_networked_air_defense_cruiser
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 8.0

	entity = "lightcruiser_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_lightcruiser_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_lightcruiser_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_lightcruiser_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Propulsion uses the entity based on Range modification, so it needs to be defined first
	modification = {
		name = funnel
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_range
		entity = "funnel_medium_01_entity"
		entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity"
		entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity"
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_medium_entity" }
			modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_fore
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_single_03_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_double_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_single_03_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_double_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
}

ship_type_swarm_coordination_vessel = {
    ship_type = ship_type_swarm_coordination_vessel
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 8.0

	entity = "lightcruiser_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.06 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_lightcruiser_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_lightcruiser_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_lightcruiser_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Propulsion uses the entity based on Range modification, so it needs to be defined first
	modification = {
		name = funnel
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_range
		entity = "funnel_medium_01_entity"
		entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity"
		entity = "funnel_medium_03_entity"
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_medium_entity" }
			modification = { entity = "hull_lightcruiser_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_fore
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_aft
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_smallturret_twin_02_entity"					fire_angle = -90 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"					 	fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = 45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
						}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"					fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_deckmounted_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_01_entity"   					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckmounted_twin_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_single_03_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_double_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity" 				fire_angle = 90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_torpedotube_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_single_03_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_double_01_entity"   				disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_torpedotube_tripple_01_entity"   			disabled = yes }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
		modification = { name = "funnel" }
	}
}

# ===== Amphibious / troop ships (clones of ship_type_troop_ship) =====


ship_type_amphibious_assault_ship = {
    ship_type = ship_type_amphibious_assault_ship
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 7

	entity = "troopship_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_troopship_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_troopship_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_troopship_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_marine_assault_ship = {
    ship_type = ship_type_marine_assault_ship
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 7

	entity = "troopship_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_troopship_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_troopship_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_troopship_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_expeditionary_sea_base = {
    ship_type = ship_type_expeditionary_sea_base
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 7

	entity = "troopship_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_troopship_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_troopship_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_troopship_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_expeditionary_fast_transport = {
    ship_type = ship_type_expeditionary_fast_transport
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 7

	entity = "troopship_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_troopship_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_troopship_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_troopship_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}

}

ship_type_orbital_support_amphibious_mothership = {
    ship_type = ship_type_orbital_support_amphibious_mothership
	weapon_type = turret
	hull_type = steel
	motion_intensity = 0.7
	length = 7

	entity = "troopship_base_entity"

	locator = {
		name = loc_foam
		position = { 0.0 0.03 0.0 }
	}

	# Positions of damage decals
	damage_decal_positions = {
		{ -0.1 0.05 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.0 0.05 0.6 0.0 }
		{ -0.0 0.055 1.0 0.0 }
		{ 0.05 0.045 0.7 0.0 }
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damaged_light' and 'damaged_heavy'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_hull_troopship_damaged_entity"
		attach = yes  								# Controls whether VFX should follow ship animation or not
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'damage' and 'damage_weak'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_troopship_damage_entity"
		attach = yes
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'idle', 'moving', 'move_local', and 'sink'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_troopship_foam_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# VFX entity for states: 'miss'
	vfx_entity = {
		entity = "vfx_ship_water_miss_entity"
		locator = loc_foam
	}

	# Armour
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_armor
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_light_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_medium_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "hull_troopship_heavy_entity" }
	}

	# Guns
	attach = {
		locator = gun_aft_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -90 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity"  					disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_small_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckcannon_big_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = -45 }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_03
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_04
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_05
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_noarmour_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "gun_casemate_nocase_01_entity" }
	}

	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_06
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_l_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						disabled = yes }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = gun_r_07
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_guns
		modification = { }
		modification = { }
		modification = { entity = "gun_deckgun_armoured_01_entity" 						fire_angle = 45 }
	}

	# Propulsion
	attach = {
		locator = root
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "troopship_sails_entity" }
		modification = { }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_01
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}
	attach = {
		locator = funnel_02
		slot_type = ship_mod_slot_propulsion
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_none_01_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
		modification = { entity = "funnel_medium_02_entity" }
	}

}
